opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My eyes swelled shut within about an hour and they are itching so badly I want to tear them out. Both eyes are puffy and streaming with tears and I can barely open them.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on really fast this afternoon after I'd been outside, and the itch and swelling are unbearable and getting worse.

symptom_narrative.onset: started about 4 hours ago with mild itching in both eyes after I was outside, then over the next couple of hours it blew up into severe itching and swelling
symptom_narrative.duration: about 4 hours and it has been getting worse, not better
symptom_narrative.character: intense, unrelenting itch in both eyes with lots of clear watery tears, and my eyelids and the skin around my eyes are puffy and swollen
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst eye discomfort I've ever had — I can hardly keep my eyes open
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: both eyes equally, and the puffiness is all around both eyes
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant since it started, steadily worsening
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing so far — I splashed tap water in them and it did nothing
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: rubbing them seems to make it flare up even more
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I've been sneezing a lot and my nose is running clear and watery at the same time
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I get a bit of hay-fever-type eye itch in spring but never anything like this severe
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't really see properly because my eyes keep watering and I can barely open them

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: seasonal hay-fever type allergies in the past

allergies_as_reported.substance: seasonal environmental allergies (pollen-type); no known drug allergies

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; was outdoors earlier today; windows at home are open

objective_data_offered.value: both eyelids and the skin around both eyes look markedly puffy and swollen
the whites of both eyes look very red, and the surface looks swollen and jelly-like
clear watery tears streaming from both eyes; no thick yellow or green gunk or crusting
I don't feel feverish and my breathing feels completely normal
